name: Orange Bank & Trust Company
description_short: Orange Bank & Trust Company is an independent community bank serving the Hudson Valley with $2.5B in assets, offering commercial lending, business banking, and wealth management across 16 offices.
description_long:
Orange Bank & Trust Company was founded in 1892 by 14 founders and has operated as an independent financial institution for over 130 years in the Hudson Valley region. The bank is publicly traded on NASDAQ under ticker OBT and has grown to more than $2.5 billion in total assets while maintaining its community banking heritage and local decision-making authority.

The bank specializes in commercial lending, business banking services, and wealth management solutions. Their service suite includes personal and business online banking, mobile banking, credit cards, trust services, remote deposit, positive pay, lockbox services, document vault access, and integrated payables solutions. They serve both individual consumers and business clients through their network of sixteen offices across Orange, Rockland, Westchester counties and the Bronx.

Orange Bank & Trust distinguishes itself through its emphasis on understanding business client needs and the ability to move quickly on decisions. The bank's leadership is actively involved in the Federal Reserve system—their President and CEO Michael J. Gilfeather was appointed to the Federal Reserve Bank of New York's Board of Directors in 2026. The bank highlights conservative banking practices paired with ongoing innovation as drivers of its growth and stability.

As a mid-sized regional bank, Orange Bank & Trust is best suited for business owners and commercial entities seeking personalized service and faster decision-making compared to large national banks, as well as individuals in their service territory seeking community-focused banking. The trade-off is that their physical presence is limited to a specific regional footprint, which may not serve customers outside the Hudson Valley area. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal online banking and login access
Business online banking enrollment and access
pros: 130+ years of establishment and stability with $2.5B in total assets and NASDAQ listing (ticker: OBT)
Leadership actively engaged at Federal Reserve Bank of New York (CEO on Board of Directors as of 2026)
Focus on commercial lending and business banking with understanding of business operational needs
16 office locations across Orange, Rockland, Westchester counties and the Bronx for regional accessibility
Comprehensive digital banking including online banking, mobile app, remote deposit, and document vault
Business-focused services including positive pay, lockbox, integrated payables, and business credit cards
Independent community bank status allowing for faster local decision-making versus large national banks
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Hudson Valley region (Orange, Rockland, Westchester, Bronx) with only 16 branches
No mention of specific deposit insurance limits, APY rates, or fee structures on website
Website content does not detail personal banking product specifics such as checking/savings account features or CD rates
Limited information on loan products, interest rates, or lending criteria for personal or business loans
No clear information about customer service availability, wait times, or accessibility for non-business hour support
best_for: Business owners and commercial enterprises in the Hudson Valley seeking personalized lending and faster loan decisions
Individuals and families within Orange, Rockland, Westchester counties and the Bronx seeking community bank relationships
Businesses requiring trust services, wealth management, and integrated payables/commercial banking solutions
diagnosis: Orange Bank & Trust is best for business owners and commercial clients in the Hudson Valley region seeking personalized service, faster decision-making, and specialized commercial lending from an established, stable independent bank. The main caveat is geographic limitation—the bank operates only 16 branches across a specific four-county region, making it unsuitable for customers outside the Hudson Valley or those requiring nationwide branch access.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
